description_long: This is a cylindrical plastic bottle with a green translucent screw-on cap, designed for holding lotion or hair balm. The bottle is decorated with vibrant illustrations of avocados and green leaves, giving it a fresh and natural appearance. The front label features bold black and white branding with Cyrillic text, indicating the product's purpose and ingredients. The back of the bottle displays a detailed information label with product details, instructions, and regulatory icons. The bottle's body is mostly white with colorful graphics, and the cap is a solid green color. The overall design is modern and visually appealing, suitable for personal care use in urban environments.
description: A white cylindrical lotion bottle with a green cap, decorated with avocado illustrations and bold branding. Features a detailed label and vibrant, fresh graphics.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main label with branding, product name, and avocado graphics.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the avocado illustrations and partial view of the side label.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full product information label and regulatory icons.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more avocado graphics and a glimpse of the side label.
